source_description: Inside an apartment, Chandler sits inside a wooden canoe resting on a patterned carpet. He holds a yellow sponge and reads a newspaper. A paddle rests inside the canoe.
Inside an apartment, Chandler sits inside a wooden canoe resting on a patterned carpet. He holds a yellow sponge and reads a newspaper. A paddle rests inside the canoe.
Joey walks through the front door carrying a folded lawn chair and a round, rusty metal patio table top. He says, "Hey, we are so in luck."
Joey carries the items further into the room and says, "Treeger said we could have all this cool stuff from the basement."
Joey carries the items further into the room and says, "Treeger said we could have all this cool stuff from the basement."
Joey places the table top down on its stand near the canoe. "Wait, right?" he asks.
Chandler looks up from his newspaper toward Joey.
Chandler drops the newspaper, grabs the paddle with both hands, and mimics a paddling motion. "No, I'm paddling away," he says.
Joey turns and walks back toward the open doorway, picking up two folded lawn chairs from the hallway.
Joey turns and walks back toward the open doorway, picking up two folded lawn chairs from the hallway.
